statusLine.command: input=$(cat); dir=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.workspace.current_dir'); remaining=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.context_window.remaining_percentage // empty'); branch=$(cd "$dir" && git -c advice.detachedHead=false rev-parse --abbrev-ref HEAD 2>/dev/null || echo ''); git_status=$(cd "$dir" && git -c advice.detachedHead=false status --porcelain 2>/dev/null | wc -l | tr -d ' '); dirty=''; [ "$git_status" -gt 0 ] 2>/dev/null && dirty=$' \033[33m\xe2\x9c\x97\033[0m'; cwd="$(basename "$dir")"; printf '\033[1;32m\xe2\x9e\x9c\033[0m \033[36m%s\033[0m' "$cwd"; [ -n "$branch" ] && printf ' \033[1;34mgit:(\033[0m\033[31m%s\033[0m\033[1;34m)\033[0m%s' "$branch" "$dirty"; [ -n "$remaining" ] && printf ' \033[2m[ctx:%d%%]\033[0m' "$remaining"
